arts.ttl: Napoli vs AC Milan – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Napoli host AC Milan in Serie A this evening hoping to get their title challenge back on track. Antonio Conte’s side have won just one of their last seven in Serie A, a run that has included five draws. However, Napoli remain just three points behind leaders Inter Milan ahead of Sunday’s fixtures. arts.ttl: AC Milan XI vs Napoli – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: AC Milan will aim to keep in touch in the race for Europe when the Rossoneri travel to Napoli this evening. Sergio Conceicao’s side are ninth in the table after a challenging campaign and sit five points adrift of the top six. arts.ttl: Napoli vs. AC Milan, Matchday 30’s key game
arts.sum: In the last 12 Serie A meetings between Napoli and AC Milan, both sides won four games (D4), after the Partenopei had been unbeaten in each of their previous eight matches against the Rossoneri in the competition, winning six in the period. Napoli (61) have 14 points more than AC Milan (47) in the table: only in three of the 153 previous matches between the two sides in Serie A history have the Azzurri faced the Rossoneri with a higher advantage (+15 on February 8th, 2014; +25 on April 15th, 2018 and +23 on April 2nd, 2023).
